text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O often makes a dramatic<n>entrance,
even if its just to a training<n>session.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm awaiting her lively arrival,<n>wondering
whether she'll be dancing<n>or singing, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Good day, Trainer! And what a fine<n>day it is!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She's decided to wear her signature<n>racewear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ensnared by my charm, are you? I<n>certainly can't
blame you for that.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not after I spent the past two hours<n>admiring my
regal self in the mirror.
choice_data_list:
Huh... So why'd you choose your racewear to
train in?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: For the sake of all involved in the<n>race, of course!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am far too dangerous when racing in<n>these
clothes, for those who gaze<n>upon me become lost
in a labyrinth of<n>allure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Like moths to the flame, my sweet<n>fans are
inevitably drawn to<n>tragedy—only once I have
crossed the<n>finish line do they awaken.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: As such, what is there to be done?The answer is simple!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Before the race takes place, I shall<n>allow them the
chance to grow<n>accustomed to this visage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh, I assure you, it can be done.After all, I am the culmination of allforms of beauty the world over!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't precisely explain why<n>she's
wearing her racewear today,<n>but I put that aside
for the moment.
choice_data_list: You sure like your signature racewear.
You sure like your signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But of course! This ensemble befits<n>my splendor!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I'll show you... This way, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O suddenly sprints away,<n>and I follow
after her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold! These golden<n>accessories—do they not
glisten in the<n>sunlight?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh! My royal mantle, boldly fluttering<n>in the wind!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Wait for it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am eternal beauty, the light of the<n>world, the
majesty of outer space...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am the enrapturer of all—the<n>Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Has more perfect attire ever existed?Nay, this is a revolution! I havebecome a living piece of designhistory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And though this racewear's form isexquisite, one mustn't forget whatlies at its source—a fabulous concept,that I created!
choice_data_list: You always know what you want.
You always know what you want.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes... It is a well-known fact that<n>I make
every style look great.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This one was designed to be most<n>suitable for me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do you know why that is?
choice_data_list: It carries the air of the Overlord.
It depicts the strength to meet expectations.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! The same holds true of my<n>noble mantle
and adornments! They<n>comprise my throne when I
race!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Those who behold me striding down<n>the turf do
not gaze in fear of my<n>power. No!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: They gaze with envy and admiration!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They may close their eyes, but I will<n>still be
there—my burning figure afire<n>in their hearts.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However! Even if it brings them to<n>their knees, I
only wish for my<n>brilliance to leave them
reassured.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will extend a hand of invitation to<n>them—to walk
together toward a stage<n>worthy of the Centurial
Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With how particular she is in her<n>design, it's
obvious how strongly<n>Opera O feels about her
racewear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes, Trainer! You are but one of<n>many with
great expectations of me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Nay, to say "many" is an<n>understatement. Is it not
obvious the<n>entire world anticipates my coming
excellence?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I hereby declare, that I shall<n>never betray
their expectations!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This attire comprises my throne when<n>I race! The
masses shall come to<n>seek my beauty.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I say to them, come to the G1 caroling<n>my name!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, and I shall greet you with more<n>radiance
yet!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For that is my duty—as the one who<n>walks the
Overlord's path!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her enthusiasm is palpable. As her<n>trainer, I'll do
everything I can to help<n>make that dream come
true.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! I shall gift you an outfit as<n>well, so you
might stand beside me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Neither the sun nor moon can rise<n>without the sky.
Thus, that is what<n>you shall become! First, your
full body<n>should have a base of sky blue...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I get the sense we're walking into<n>dangerous
territory. I'd better stop<n>her while we're ahead!
